function 400
function 404
func:
var count = flow.get("messageCount") || 0; // Retrieve current count
count++; // Increment counter
flow.set("messageCount", count); // Store updated count

msg.payload = count; // Send the count as output
return msg;

name: function 405
function 406
function 407
function 408
function 409
func:
var now = new Date();
var timestamp = now.getFullYear() + "-" +
    String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0') + "-" +
    String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0') + "_" +
    String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0') + "-" +
    String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0') + "-" +
    String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');

var filename = `C:/images/output_${timestamp}.csv`; // Define filename variable
flow.set("csvFilename", filename); // Store filename for future use

// Write header row for CSV
msg.filename = filename; // Pass filename to the file node
msg.payload = "messagecount,zone,min,max,snr\n"; // CSV header
msg.append = false; // Ensure fresh file with header

return msg;
